description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and eastern Arabic numerals. Dating: Late 18th or early 19th century. The figures are organized by parasha of the week. Several of the columns are headed by the name of an individual, such as Moshe b. Naʿim, David פוורטי, and Nissim Najjār.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
